pyaion.requirements:
# List the requirements for your package here.

# Unlike a requirements.txt file, you should aim to be as loose as possible in
# your version requirements (i.e. prefer "numpy>1" to "numpy==1.5.4"). This
# allows your package to coexist easily with other packages.
#
# Dependency pinning for e.g. CI testing is achieved through Nix; the requirements.txt
# file in this repository was generated from the nix flake's evaluation and is only for
# compatibility with nixless systems, i.e. Windows.
#
# Despite the comment in requirements.txt, don't run pip-compile to update it. Instead,
# run `nix run .#update_requirements` after adding your new packages to this file
# (or requirementsDev.in).

# List packages here, e.g.:
# numpy
